---
title: "History of Christian Names, A. 2 vols. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Landmarks of History.”"
---

## History of Christian Names, A. 2 vols. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Landmarks of History.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1863
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history, onomastics.
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John W Parker and Son West Strand, London

### Notes

A revised edition was published in 1884.  The book drew on a long-standing interest of CMY\'s, which she had expressed in a series of articles on \'Name-fancying\', published in <i>MP</i> (May 1852-August 1862).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
